mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification (user_id, type, title, content, source_user_id, source_id, source_type, is_read, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{type}, #{title}, #{content}, #{sourceUserId}, #{sourceId}, #{sourceType}, 0, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE notification SET is_read = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE notification SET is_read = 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
UPDATE notification SET is_read = 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND type = #{type} AND is_read = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0

SELECT user_id, COUNT(*) AS unread_count, SUM(CASE WHEN type = 'like' AND is_read = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS like_count, SUM(CASE WHEN type = 'favorite' AND is_read = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS favorite_count, SUM(CASE WHEN type = 'comment' AND is_read = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS comment_count, SUM(CASE WHEN type = 'follow' AND is_read = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS follow_count, SUM(CASE WHEN type = 'repost' AND is_read = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS repost_count FROM notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY user_id
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO notification_count (user_id, unread_count, like_count, favorite_count, comment_count, follow_count, repost_count) VALUES (#{userId}, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0)
